name: German Sweet Chocolate Cake- Getgood
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in water and let cool.
2. Beat butter and sugar together.
3. Add egg yolks, vanilla extract, and melted chocolate to the butter mixture. Stir until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk to the wet ingredients, beating until just mixed.
6. Beat egg whites with sugar until stiff peaks form. Fold into batter gently.
7. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined on bottoms with waxed paper.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a center spring back when lightly pressed.
9. Cool in pans for 15 minutes, then remove and cool completely on racks.
10. Spread frosting between layers and over the top of the cake.
Coconut-Pecan Frosting:
1. Combine evaporated milk, sugar, egg yolks, butter, and vanilla extract in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and stir in coconut flakes and chopped pecans.
4. Allow to cool slightly before spreading.
